Description: Implement a comprehensive authentication system for user registration, login, and account management.

Features.Description: Implement email and password based user registration and login.
AcceptanceCriteria: All user stories in this feature must pass security review
Login must work across all supported browsers

UserStories.Summary: As a user, I want to register with email so I can create an account
UserStories.Description: User can register using email and password with validation.
AcceptanceCriteria: Registration form with email, password, confirm password
Password strength requirements (8+ chars, special char)

UserStories.Summary: As a user, I want to log in with Google OAuth so I can access quickly
AcceptanceCriteria: Google Sign-In button on login page
Create or link user account on successful auth
Social login must work with existing accounts

UserStories.Summary: As a user, I want to reset my password so I can regain access
UserStories.Description: Implement password reset functionality with email verification.
AcceptanceCriteria: Forgot password link on login page
Password reset email with secure link (expires in 24h)
New password form with strength validation
Password reset must invalidate all existing sessions

Features.Description: Implement OAuth 2.0 authentication with Google and other providers.
AcceptanceCriteria: Social login must integrate seamlessly with existing auth system

Features.Description: Implement password reset and account recovery flows.
AcceptanceCriteria: Password reset links must expire after 24 hours

Description: Redesign the product catalog with improved filtering, sorting, and search capabilities.

Features.Description: Implement hierarchical category navigation for products.
AcceptanceCriteria: Category hierarchy must support unlimited nesting
Category changes must not break existing URLs

UserStories.Summary: As a shopper, I want to browse products by category so I can find items easily
UserStories.Description: Implement category-based product browsing with nested categories.
AcceptanceCriteria: Product grid updates when category selected
URL updates to reflect selected category
Category selection must persist across sessions

Features.Description: Implement price range, rating, and attribute-based filtering.
AcceptanceCriteria: Filter state must persist across navigation

UserStories.Summary: As a shopper, I want to filter products by price range so I can stay within budget
UserStories.Description: Add price range slider and min/max input fields for filtering.
AcceptanceCriteria: Price range slider with min/max values
Input fields for exact min/max prices
Real-time product count update as range changes
Price filter must work with category filter

UserStories.Summary: As a shopper, I want to sort products by price, rating, and popularity
UserStories.Description: Add sorting options to product listing pages.
AcceptanceCriteria: URL updates to reflect sort order
Sort order must be remembered per user

Features.Description: Implement full-text search with autocomplete and suggestions.
AcceptanceCriteria: Search must return relevant results within 500ms
Search suggestions must update in real-time

UserStories.Summary: As a shopper, I want to search for products so I can find specific items
UserStories.Description: Implement full-text search with autocomplete and suggestions.
AcceptanceCriteria: Search results page with relevance sorting
Search suggestions based on popular queries

Features.Description: Display user's past orders with status, date, and total amount.
AcceptanceCriteria: Order history must be accessible from user profile
Orders must be filterable by date range

UserStories.Summary: As a user, I want to view my order history so I can track my purchases
UserStories.Description: Display user's past orders with status, date, and total amount.
AcceptanceCriteria: Order history page accessible from user profile
List of orders with date, status, total
Order status must update in real-time

Features.Description: Implement wishlist functionality for saving products for later.
AcceptanceCriteria: Wishlist items must be shareable via email

UserStories.Summary: As a user, I want to add items to a wishlist so I can save items for later
UserStories.Description: Implement wishlist functionality for saving products.
AcceptanceCriteria: Wishlist button on product detail page

Description: Integrate multiple payment gateways (Stripe, PayPal, credit cards) with fraud detection.

Features.Description: Implement Stripe payment processing with webhooks for event handling.
AcceptanceCriteria: Stripe payments must be PCI compliant
Webhooks must handle all payment events

UserStories.Summary: As a user, I want to integrate with Stripe payment gateway
UserStories.Description: Implement Stripe payment processing with webhooks for event handling.
AcceptanceCriteria: Stripe API integration for credit card payments
Payment form with card details input

Features.Description: Implement PayPal payment processing with IPN for notifications.
AcceptanceCriteria: PayPal integration must support both redirect and embedded flows

UserStories.Summary: As a user, I want to integrate with PayPal payment gateway
UserStories.Description: Implement PayPal payment processing with IPN for notifications.
AcceptanceCriteria: Redirect to PayPal for payment authorization

Features.Description: Allow users to store and manage multiple payment methods.
AcceptanceCriteria: Payment methods must be securely stored using tokenization
Users must be able to set a default payment method

UserStories.Summary: As a user, I want to save multiple payment methods for future use
UserStories.Description: Allow users to store and manage multiple payment methods.
AcceptanceCriteria: Payment methods must be encrypted at rest

Features.Description: Add fraud detection rules and monitoring.
AcceptanceCriteria: Fraud detection must flag suspicious transactions
Manual review queue must be implemented

UserStories.Summary: As a user, I want to implement fraud detection for payments
UserStories.Description: Add fraud detection rules and monitoring.
AcceptanceCriteria: Fraud detection rules based on transaction patterns
Fraud detection must integrate with payment gateways

Description: Optimize mobile app performance for iOS and Android platforms.

Features.Description: Reduce app startup time from 3.2s to under 1.5s.
AcceptanceCriteria: Startup time must be under 1.5s on mid-range devices
Performance must be measured and monitored

UserStories.Summary: As a user, I want to optimize mobile app startup time
UserStories.Description: Reduce app startup time from 3.2s to under 1.5s.
AcceptanceCriteria: Startup time under 1.5s on mid-range devices
Startup performance must be monitored in production

Features.Description: Implement offline-first architecture with data caching.
AcceptanceCriteria: App must work offline with cached data
Changes must sync automatically when network reconnects

UserStories.Summary: As a user, I want to improve app responsiveness on slow networks
UserStories.Description: Implement offline-first architecture with data caching.
AcceptanceCriteria: Offline data caching for products and user data

Features.Description: Optimize memory consumption to prevent crashes on low-memory devices.

UserStories.Summary: As a user, I want to reduce app memory usage
UserStories.Description: Optimize memory consumption to prevent crashes on low-memory devices.
AcceptanceCriteria: Memory usage must be logged and alerted on

Features.Description: Reduce battery consumption during app usage.
AcceptanceCriteria: Battery usage must be comparable to similar apps

UserStories.Summary: As a user, I want to improve app battery usage
UserStories.Description: Reduce battery consumption during app usage.
AcceptanceCriteria: Battery usage comparable to similar apps
Battery optimization must not impact functionality

Description: Users cannot log in when using Safari browser on iOS devices.
StepsToReproduce: Open app on iPhone with Safari
Login fails with no error message

Summary: Product images not loading on Android
Description: Product images fail to load on Android Chrome browser.
Password reset emails are not being delivered to users.
StepsToReproduce: Click Forgot password on login page

Summary: Search returns no results for valid queries
Description: Product search is not returning any results even for existing products.
StepsToReproduce: Type product name in search bar

Summary: Payment fails with Stripe test card
Description: Stripe payment processing fails with test card 4242 4242 4242 4242.
StepsToReproduce: Enter test card: 4242 4242 4242 4242, any future date, any CVC

Summary: App crashes on Android when opening product detail
Description: App crashes when user taps on a product to view details on Android.

Summary: Wishlist items not persisting after refresh
Description: Items added to wishlist disappear when user refreshes the page.
Password validation rejects valid strong passwords.
StepsToReproduce: Try to register with password: MyStr0ng!Pass
Error: Password must contain at least one number (but it does)

Summary: Category filter not working on mobile
Description: Category filtering does not work properly on mobile devices.
StepsToReproduce: Products from other categories still appear

Description: Users cannot delete saved payment methods from their account.
StepsToReproduce: Click delete icon next to a payment method
Payment method still appears in list

Summary: App slow to load on iOS 14
Description: App takes 5+ seconds to load on iOS 14 devices.
StepsToReproduce: Open app on iPhone with iOS 14
App takes 5+ seconds to become interactive
